function.message: I can’t complete this deletion request as written because I can’t uniquely identify a canonical project record for “the attic rainwater rig.” I found the day-job exception project reference, but without a canonical project counterpart for the attic item, deleting one would require guessing.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied inbox processing and deletion workflows: verify against canonical records and do not delete when evidence does not uniquely support a target.
function.outcome_justification: The request depends on comparing two projects by start date, but only one project reference can be mapped canonically. The second reference ('attic rainwater rig') is not present as a canonical project record in the project lane, so selecting a deletion target would be speculative.
